instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `d97f230` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Resolved biography conflict using the newer Stanford text
- Preserved commit on branch `recovered-move-to-stanford`
- Created merge commit `c555cfb`
- Verified clean working tree and valid ancestry

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
--- branches ---
' && git branch -avv && printf '
--- reflog ---
' && git reflog --all --date=iso -n 30 && printf '
--- recent graph ---
' && git log --all --oneline --decora

printf '%s\n' '--- lost commit ---' && git show --stat --oneline --decorate d97f230 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff d97f230 && printf '%s\n' '--- master tip ---' && git show --stat --oneline d7d3e4b && printf '
# Preserve the recovered detached commit under a descriptive branch.
